startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Pages to crawl. Each item is a URL string.

maxPages.title: Max pages
maxPages.description: Maximum pages to crawl in total.

followLinks.title: Follow same-domain links
followLinks.description: If on, enqueue links on the same domain up to maxPages.

maxTextLength.title: Max text length per page
maxTextLength.description: Truncate extracted page text to this many characters.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Route requests through Apify Proxy (datacenter). Uses credit. Helps with IP blocks.
